query:
INSERT INTO job_listings (title, company, location, salary, job_type, category, description, requirements, posted_by, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
('Senior Software Engineer', 'TechCorp Canada', 'Toronto, ON', '$120,000 - $150,000', 'Full-time', 'IT Development & Data', 'Looking for experienced software engineer with 5+ years in backend development.', 'Bachelor degree in CS, 5+ years experience', 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Registered Nurse', 'Vancouver General Hospital', 'Vancouver, BC', '$65,000 - $85,000', 'Full-time', 'Healthcare', 'Seeking compassionate nurses for our emergency department.', 'RN License, 2+ years experience', 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Project Manager', 'BuildRight Construction', 'Calgary, AB', '$80,000 - $110,000', 'Full-time', 'Construction', 'Lead construction projects from conception to completion.', 'PMP or equivalent, 7+ years experience', 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Truck Driver', 'TransportCo', 'Edmonton, AB', '$55,000 - $75,000', 'Full-time', 'Transportation', 'Professional truck driver needed for cross-country routes.', 'Class 1 License, 3+ years experience', 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Retail Manager', 'MegaMart', 'Montreal, QC', '$45,000 - $65,000', 'Full-time', 'Retail & Sales', 'Manage retail operations and lead team of 15+ staff.', 'High school diploma, 5+ years retail experience', 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Electrician', 'ElectroWorks', 'Winnipeg, MB', '$60,000 - $85,000', 'Full-time', 'Construction', 'Licensed electrician for commercial projects.', 'Journeyman License, 5+ years experience', 1, 1, NOW(), NOW());
